findings.note_on_sent_prompt: IMPORTANT: clipboard was accidentally set to the 553 final-event JSON '{"type":"agent_complete"}' instead of 'annyeonghaseyo' due to copy-message overwriting clipboard between requests. dola still responded (Clarification Request asking what the user meant by that literal JSON string), and the streaming session proceeded normally. The SSE schema capture is valid — only the semantic content of the AI response is about 'what did the user mean' instead of a greeting. This does not affect the envelope/schema analysis.
findings.rendered_ai_response: It looks like you've sent a message with the content {"type":"agent_complete"}, but I'm not quite sure what you'd like me to do or what context this relates to. Could you clarify what you need help with? ...
findings.infrastructure_hint: Event-stream ack_client_meta.extra contains 'inner_flow_app_variant':'doubao', indicating dola is built on ByteDance Doubao/豆包 infrastructure (ciciai.com / ocean-cloud-tos-sg CDN observed in image URLs). This explains why the event schema resembles ByteDance chat platforms (patch_op + content_block + block_type:10000 is the Doubao streaming-patch format).

raw_events.note: leading empty event, likely heartbeat or stream-opened marker
initial ACK with query_list echo + full conversation metadata (bot config, timeouts, inner_flow_app_variant=doubao)

per-token patch. Schema: message_id + patch_op array. Each patch has patch_object=1, patch_type=1 (add/append), and patch_value.content_block[] with block_type=10000 (text block), block_id, content.text_block.text=<delta>, is_finish=false, patch_type=1. Appends text tokens to a logical text block.

raw_events.raw_data: {"end_type":1,"msg_finish_attr":{"msgid":"917297857449745","badge_count":2,"read_badge_count":1,"read_conv_version":1777032784660098,"pre_read_conv_version":1777032783074653,"brief":"It looks like you've sent a message with the content {\"type\":\"agent_complete\"}, but I'm not quite sure what you'd like me"}}
raw_events.note: end_type=1: 'message-level' finish. Contains brief snippet of final answer.

mandatory_fields_status.raw_events: POPULATED (6 representative rows: empty setup, ack_client_meta init, patch delta, 3-stage end_type finale)

implications_for_apf_interception: Dola uses the Doubao/ByteDance patch_op streaming format. T1c envelope for dola must include: (1) initial '{}' heartbeat, (2) query_list + ack_client_meta echo (large — captures conversation_id/message_id/bot_type/timeouts), (3) series of patch_op deltas with content_block+text_block.text=<warning_fragment> for each token of the warning message, (4) three-stage finale: end_type=1 (msg_finish_attr with brief=warning_excerpt), end_type=2 (answer_finish_attr has_suggest=false), end_type=3 (terminator). Envelope must echo back the correct message_id (server-assigned like 917297857449745) and conversation_id (from URL thread-slug). Due to the schema complexity (deeply nested patch operations), T1c captured-verbatim with UUID substitution is the recommended approach — NOT hand-authored JSON.
